creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2009-08-14 19:54:33 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    security             Makefile 
  Added files:
    security/mailzu      Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
    security/mailzu/files pkg-message.in 
  Log:
  MailZu is a simple and intuitive web interface to manage Amavisd-new
  quarantine. Users can view their own quarantine, release/delete messages
  or request the release of messages. MailZu is written in PHP and requires
  Amavisd-new version greater than 2.3.0.
  
  WWW: http://sourceforge.net/projects/mailzu/
  
  PR:             ports/137197
  Submitted by:   Sahil Tandon <sahil at tandon.net>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1051    +1 -0      ports/security/Makefile
  1.1       +78 -0     ports/security/mailzu/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/security/mailzu/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +24 -0     ports/security/mailzu/files/pkg-message.in (new)
  1.1       +6 -0      ports/security/mailzu/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +206 -0    ports/security/mailzu/pkg-plist (new)
